outliers.title: Is Canada actually in a recession? The truth behind the GDP numbers

transcript_analysis.title: Is Canada actually in a recession? The truth behind the GDP numbers
transcript_analysis.transcript_preview: Kind: captions Language: en Is Canada actually in a recession or are we just looking at a statistical mirage? Statistics Canada recently reported that our national GDP contracted for a second consecutive quarter. By standard economic shorthand, that technically meets the [music] definition of a recession.
